reasoning: The objective to "break up NOAA" is primarily being pursued by the Trump administration through the FY2026 budget proposal, which includes an OMB passback to dismantle NOAA's research divisions and drastically cut its funding. Passing a federal budget or formally restructuring a statutory agency requires an act of Congress. Because the 2026 fiscal year does not begin until October 1, 2025, Congress will not finalize these appropriations before the resolution date of July 1, 2025. Additionally, the maintainers of the r/Keep_Track spreadsheet require definitive final actions (such as passed legislation or finalized, unchallenged rules) to mark an objective as "Complete" (✔), as evidenced by other major structural changes remaining "in progress" while courts or legislative processes play out. Given the 45-day window from the May 15 forecast date to the July 1 resolution date, it is highly improbable this objective will be marked as completely fulfilled.
